creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Corsmith, thank you for your contribution

Can you please:

* Separate the version update from the changes/fixes into two separate attachments, so that the latter can be merged to the quarterly branch
* Confirm these changes pass QA (portlint, poudriere)
* Set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are MAINTAINER of. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]
